creator: saper@system.pl
text:
When compiling anything that includes <dejagnu.h>:

In file included from test_cache.cpp:44:
/usr/local/include/dejagnu.h: In function 'void totals()':
/usr/local/include/dejagnu.h:139: warning: format '%d' expects type 'int', but argument 2 has type 'void (*)(const char*, ...)'

Bumping PORTREVISION since this affects every other utility using dejagnu.

This is already fixed upstream:

http://42.pl/u/1xsw [dejagnu git repo]

Added file(s):
- files/patch-dejagnu.h

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
